title: Icons Fix
description: Removes the advertisement and new splash texts from "Icons" resourcepack.
body:
# ⚡ Functionality #
1. **Removes the advertisement icon** on both the main menu and the pause menu.
2. **Removes the splash texts** added by Icons.
# ➕ Dependecies #
It only needs Icons resourcepack, well..., to fix it.
# ❔ How to use #
Install the resourcepack and **please remember to put it above Icons resourcepack**.

⚠️ You can download any version of this resourcepack for any version of Minecraft and it will hide the advertisement icon. But each version has its own list of Splash Texts in Minecraft.

So, **installing a newer version on older Minecraft versions will port newer splash texts, and vise-versa.**

# ❗ Report Issues #
**Any issues with this project can be reported in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5PCXmRYcJc).**

# 📢 My Modpacks Featuring It #
This resourcepack is featured on 2 of my modpacks:

> **[Check Out "Ultimately Optimized"](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-ultimately-optimized)**
> ###
> **[Check Out "Low on Water"](https://modrinth.com/modpack/low-on-water)**

# 🪙 Credit #
I shall credit the language files to the owner of [Icons resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons). I slightly modified it for my pack to work.

# 🎫 Licencing #
> This modpack is licensed under **Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 4.0 International**. A summary of it means that you, as a user of this project, can **redistributable my project as long as it isn't modified, it isn't for commercial use, and you credit me and my project**.
